description: List with flags to set for given transaction

timestamp.description: timestamp indicating when event triggering this flag occurred; supported format is YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS+HH:MM; time zone info (+HH:MM) can be skipped in which case it is assumed that the value is in UTC

value.description: Value of a flag - meaning depends on a given flag name, see table of possible values

extra_data.description: Additional data related to this flag
